stemHtml: A licence holder with a valid Class 1 medical certificate experiences considerable visual acuity loss and chronic headaches. What must they stop doing?

options.a: Exercising all privileges of the licence.
options.b: Exercising type rating privileges only, while retaining other privileges.
options.c: Acting as PIC in commercial transport, while retaining other privileges.
options.d: Acting as PIC in both commercial and non-commercial transport, while retaining other privileges.
